title: quercus utahensis var. submollis
intro: Quercus utahensis var. submollis, also known as the Utah live oak, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the Quercus genus, which is native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain tannins and flavonoids that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus utahensis var. submollis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the leaves and bark of this plant are used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to treat various ailments.
